---
title: "Charles Smythe"
---

## Charles Smythe

**Dates:** (d.1832)

### Description

of Brambridge

### Biography

nephew of Sir Edward Smythe, 4th Bt. (1719-1784), and brother of Mary Anne (Smythe) Fitzherbert (d.1837).  They were Roman Catholic. [PB 1914 Smythe of Eshe Hall, Bt.; <i>Hampshire Telegraph</i> 29 October 1832].

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
